jobs.title: Senior Management Accountant - 6 month FTC
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><h2><strong>Join the Web3 revolution at Ramp Network!</strong></h2><p>We&rsquo;re looking for a remote fixed-term Senior Management Accountant who can&#39;t stop building reliable monthly close workflows on the Ramp Network on-ramp and off-ramp products.</p><p>You&rsquo;ll partner with Ramp&rsquo;s Finance team &mdash; covering the Pay-Outs API platform, the Compliance &amp; KYC stack, and the B2B SDK billing reconciliation flow &mdash; to deliver accurate and timely financial deliverables.</p>

jobs.title: Staff Engineer, Compliance Platform
jobs.content: <p>Build the Ramp Network Compliance & KYC platform &mdash; the AML / KYC / fraud-prevention layer that wraps every fiat-to-crypto and crypto-to-fiat transaction.</p><p>Ramp&rsquo;s mission is to bridge the gap between today&#39;s financial system and the emerging crypto economy. The Compliance Platform team is the regulatory backbone underneath every product line &mdash; the on-ramp widget, the off-ramp widget, the Pay-Outs API, and the B2B SDK.</p>
